ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "nature_of_complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nature of the complaint */,
  "received_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "pending_status" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the complaint is pending */,
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citizen who submitted the complaint */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department handling the complaint */,
  "complaint_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the complaint */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned to resolve the complaint */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  "escalation_level" INTEGER /* Level of escalation (1 for initial, 2 for departmental review, 3 for higher-level review) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the complaint (high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the complaint (web portal, phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_citizen_id FOREIGN KEY ("citizen_id") REFERENCES citizens ("citizen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_nature_of_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("nature_of_complaint_id") REFERENCES nature_of_complaints ("nature_of_complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nature_of_complaints" (
  "nature_of_complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of complaint */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the complaint type (minor, major, critical) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint type (application, allotment, withdrawal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nature_of_complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizens" (
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the citizen */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the citizen */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the citizen */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the citizen */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the citizen */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the citizen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the citizen's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the citizen's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
